expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: single embedding component planning covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle, and regression-sensitive integration states
expectations.evidence: The plan explicitly restates the required focus and provides dedicated sections for each: “Focus (must-cover): single embedding component planning covers: 1) panel-stack composition, 2) embedding lifecycle, 3) regression-sensitive integration states.” It then includes “A) Panel-stack composition scenarios”, “B) Embedding lifecycle checkpoints”, and “C) Regression-sensitive integration states (host ↔ embedded boundary)”.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The document is titled “Phase4a QA Plan — Component Stack Composition” and states “Primary phase under test: phase4a”. It also frames content as phase4a planning: “This phase4a artifact defines the component-level QA coverage…” and includes “Test coverage matrix (phase4a)” plus “Minimal acceptance criteria (phase4a advisory gate)”, indicating alignment with phase4a expectations.
